title: House Speaker Mike Johnson says the U.S. is 'not at war' with Iran
snippet: Johnson stated 'We are not at war' and 'We're policing the Strait of Hormuz and trying to get a peace.' Contradicts Trump's own use of 'war' language. Johnson said no active kinetic military bombing or firing. Comes on eve of WPR 60-day deadline May 1.
tag_reason: First report of Johnson 'not at war' claim; new legal framing contradicting Trump's own rhetoric
